title: Founder Jam Config
description: Startup context for Founder Jam skills. Generated by founder-setup, consumed by all other skills.

track.description: Workshop track: product (prototype building) or growth (go-to-market)

problem_statement.description: The core problem your startup solves

team_size.description: Number of people on the team

traction.description: Current traction: users, revenue, waitlist, LOIs, etc.

facilitated_mode.description: true = workshop mode with facilitator challenges; false = solo mode

icp_segment.description: Selected beachhead ICP segment (set by icp-definer)

channels_selected.description: Primary distribution channels (set by icp-definer or growth-builder)

lead_magnet.description: Selected lead magnet type and title (set by offer-designer)

business_type.description: Business model type for tailored recommendations
